title: Develop agents and applications using agentic programming tools
summary: Learn how to develop applications using agentic programming tools and techniques. This training covers how to configure custom agents in the development environment, how to develop or update apps using the GitHub Spec Kit, and how to create AI-enabled apps with embedded agents using the GitHub Copilot SDK.

sections.title: Develop agents and applications using agentic programming tools
sections.summary: Learn how to develop applications using agentic programming tools and techniques. This training covers how to configure custom agents in the development environment, how to develop or update apps using the GitHub Spec Kit, and how to create AI-enabled apps with embedded agents using the GitHub Copilot SDK.

lessons.title: Configure GitHub Copilot instructions and create custom agents
lessons.content_md:
This module covers how to configure and customize GitHub Copilot in Visual Studio Code using instruction files, prompt files, custom agents, and agent handoffs to create tailored AI-assisted development workflows.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/configure-customize-github-copilot-visual-studio-code/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Configure GitHub Copilot instructions and create custom agents

lessons.title: Get started with spec-driven development and GitHub Spec Kit
lessons.content_md:
Learn to implement the spec-driven development methodology and GitHub Spec Kit for greenfield applications.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/spec-driven-development-github-spec-kit-greenfield-intro/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Get started with spec-driven development and GitHub Spec Kit

lessons.title: Implement spec-driven development using the GitHub Spec Kit
lessons.content_md:
Implement the spec-driven development methodology using GitHub Spec Kit and GitHub Copilot in Visual Studio Code. Training covers a brownfield scenario for enterprise developers, emphasizing intent-first philosophy with living specifications.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/spec-driven-development-github-spec-kit-enterprise-developers/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Implement spec-driven development using the GitHub Spec Kit

lessons.title: Develop AI-enabled apps using the GitHub Copilot SDK
lessons.content_md:
This module covers how to develop AI-enabled applications using the GitHub Copilot SDK. You install the SDK, explore its features, and build AI agents that can be integrated into your applications to automate tasks and enhance functionality.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/develop-ai-enabled-apps-using-github-copilot-sdk/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Develop AI-enabled apps using the GitHub Copilot SDK

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Develop agents and applications using agentic programming tools
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Develop agents and applications using agentic programming tools**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
